name: sv.macro.decl with sv.macro.ref.expr outside always block
description: Code should include a SystemVerilog macro declaration (`sv.macro.decl`) referenced by a macro expression (`sv.macro.ref.expr`) that is consumed outside of an `sv.always` block, such as by a `sim.clocked_terminate` operation.
snippet:
sv.macro.decl @STOP_COND_
  %STOP_COND_ = sv.macro.ref.expr @STOP_COND_() : () -> i1
  %1 = comb.and bin %STOP_COND_, %cond : i1
  sim.clocked_terminate %clock, %1, success, verbose

name: dangling macro reference after StripSV pass
description: Code should include a macro reference expression that remains after the StripSV pass removes the corresponding `sv.macro.decl`, resulting in a dangling reference and undefined symbol error.
